title: 中文教师 （兼职）Chinese Language Teacher (Part Time)
description:
在华程，我们致力于培养自信、双语兼备的学习者。作为我们的中文教师，您将在课堂教学与学生成长中发挥关键作用，让每一位孩子都拥有积极而愉快的学习体验。如果您热爱教育、喜欢与孩子相处，并期待在温暖、支持性的环境中工作，我们诚挚欢迎您加入我们的团队。

工作地点：Serene Centre（地铁站：植物园地铁站）

中文教师 （兼职） 中学S1-S4

工作内容：

  • 依据中心教材教授中学华文课程

  • 备课、设计教学活动，并确保课堂生动、有趣、有效

  • 进行课堂管理，营造积极、支持性的学习环境，帮助学生提升自信、提高成绩，并培养学习兴趣

  • 记录及跟进学生的出勤、作业与学习表现

  • 定期与家长沟通学生的学习进展

  • 根据课程表于工作日午后/傍晚及周末授课

任职条件：

  • 拥有教育、教学、语言学、中文语言或相关专业

  • 1–5 年相关教学经验或相关领域工作经验

  • 华文能力优秀

  • 喜欢孩子，能够营造正面、温暖的学习氛围

  • 良好的课堂管理能力、沟通能力及团队合作精神

  • 有责任感、有耐心，并热爱教学与儿童成长

加入我们的理由：

  • 帮助孩子建立自信、提升华文能力，参与他们的成长旅程

  • 完善教材、结构化课程和团队支持

  • 友善、合作的工作文化

  • 每一天都在从事有意义、有价值的教育工作

At Hua Cheng, we believe in nurturing confident, bilingual learners. As our Chinese Language Teacher, you will play a meaningful role in supporting students’ learning and growth, ensuring every child has a positive and enjoyable classroom experience. If you love teaching, enjoy working with children, and value a warm, supportive environment, we would be delighted to meet you.

Work location: Serene Centre (MRT Station: Botanic Gardens MRT)

Chinese Language Teacher (Part Time) - Secondary 1 to 4

What You’ll Do

  • Teach Chinese Language to Secondary students using provided curriculum

  • Prepare lesson plans and design engaging, effective learning activities

  • Manage classroom behaviour and create a positive, supportive learning atmosphere to help students build confidence, improve results, and develop interest in learning

  • Monitor and maintain student attendance, homework, and learning progress

  • Communicate with parents regularly on students’ performance and development

  • Teach according to the centre’s schedule, including weekday afternoons/evenings and weekends.

What You’ll Bring

Bachelor’s Degree in Education, Teaching, Linguistics, Chinese Language or related fields (or equivalent qualification)

  • 1–5 years of relevant teaching or education-related experience

  • Strong command of Chinese

  • Enjoy working with children and able to create a positive, supportive, nurturing learning environment

  • Good classroom management, communication skills, and a collaborative mindset

  • Responsible, patient, and passionate about supporting children’s growth

Why Join Us

  • Make a meaningful impact by helping children build confidence and improve their Chinese

  • Structured curriculum, comprehensive teaching materials, and strong team support

  • Supportive, collaborative working culture

  • Meaningful and fulfilling work every day, contributing to each child’s learning journey

postedCompany.description:
在华程，我们致力于培养自信、双语兼备的学习者。作为我们的中文教师，您将在课堂教学与学生成长中发挥关键作用，让每一位孩子都拥有积极而愉快的学习体验。如果您热爱教育、喜欢与孩子相处，并期待在温暖、支持性的环境中工作，我们诚挚欢迎您加入我们的团队。

Hua Cheng Education Centre was spearheaded by a team of experienced NIE trained teachers in the year 2000. We had developed our own curriculum and teaching methods in the teaching of Chinese language.

At Hua Cheng, we believe in nurturing confident, bilingual learners. As our Chinese Language Teacher, you will play a meaningful role in supporting students’ learning and growth, ensuring every child has a positive and enjoyable classroom experience. If you love teaching, enjoy working with children, and value a warm, supportive environment, we would be delighted to meet you.
postedCompany.name: HUA CHENG EDUCATION CENTRE (JALAN SERENE) PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D10 Ardmore, Bukit Timah, Holland Road, Tanglin
